content: classify  Table of contents Prototype: classify(text) Return type: boolean Description: Returns whether the canonicalization of text is a currently set class. This is useful for transforming variables into classes. Arguments: text : string - Input string - in the range: .* Example: code classes : "i_am_the_policy_host" expression => classify ( "master.example.org" ); See also: canonify() , classmatch() , classesmatching()
